name: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG
description: The RISC-V SIG group aims to provide the openEuler RISC-V version and guide the software package and system construction of openEuler RISC-V, so that developers who are interested in RISC-V can participate in the development of open source systems.

name: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG maintains 20 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The RISC-V SIG group aims to provide the openEuler RISC-V version and guide the software package and system construction of openEuler RISC-V, so that developers who are interested in RISC-V can participate in the development of open source systems.. The SIG has 16 core members and maintains 20 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at riscv@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG maintains 20 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-RISC-V.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-RISC-V SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Wei Wu, Dong Du, Junqiang Wang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
